---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a feature for bolt-cowork
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

### Problem

What problem does this solve? Who encounters it and when?

### Proposed solution

How should it work from the user's perspective? Include example commands or config if relevant.

### Alternatives considered

Other approaches you've thought about and why you ruled them out.

### Target version

Which upcoming version does this fit? (see roadmap in README)

[e.g. v0.4 — TUI, v0.5 — sub-agent coordination, or "no preference"]

### Additional context

Any other details, references, or prior art.
